items.title: Australia to replace paper passenger cards with digital arrival declaration - SBS
items.commentary: Australia is replacing the traditional paper incoming passenger cards with a digital arrival declaration for travellers. This change aims to streamline the arrivals process and will affect how everyone entering the country provides their details.
items.commentary_pt: A Austrália está substituindo os tradicionais cartões de desembarque em papel por uma declaração digital de chegada para os viajantes. Essa mudança busca agilizar o processo de entrada e afetará a forma como todos que chegam ao país fornecem seus dados.

items.title: Australia Announces Higher Salary Threshold for Nigerians, Others Applying for Skilled Work Visas - Legit.ng
items.commentary: Australia has raised the minimum salary threshold that employers must meet to sponsor workers on skilled visas. Applicants and sponsoring employers will now need to satisfy higher income requirements for eligibility.
items.commentary_pt: A Austrália elevou o salário mínimo que os empregadores precisam oferecer para patrocinar trabalhadores em vistos de qualificação profissional. Candidatos e empregadores patrocinadores agora precisarão atender a exigências de renda mais altas para se qualificar.

items.title: 'You've got no choice': The $1,475 fee leaving some in Australia feeling 'captive' - SBS
items.commentary: A visa-related fee of $1,475 is reportedly leaving some people in Australia feeling trapped in their current situation. The cost creates financial pressure for those seeking to change or maintain their visa status.
items.commentary_pt: Uma taxa relacionada a vistos de US$ 1.475 estaria deixando algumas pessoas na Austrália se sentindo presas à sua situação atual. O custo gera pressão financeira para quem busca mudar ou manter seu status de visto.

items.title: Australia’s ‘unfair’ visa price hikes: what are they, why have they gone up, and why does it matter? - The Guardian
items.commentary: Australia has increased visa application fees across several categories, drawing criticism that the hikes are unfair. The higher costs affect prospective applicants and add to the overall expense of migrating to or remaining in the country.
items.commentary_pt: A Austrália aumentou as taxas de solicitação de visto em várias categorias, gerando críticas de que os aumentos são injustos. Os custos mais altos afetam os candidatos e elevam a despesa total de migrar para o país ou permanecer nele.

items.title: Hanson says Australia has a ‘language problem’ due to immigration. After arriving with little English, Marziyah is now a lawyer with a mission - The Guardian
items.commentary: A public debate has emerged over claims linking immigration to language difficulties in Australia, illustrated by the story of a migrant who arrived with little English and became a lawyer. The discussion touches on integration and the experiences of migrants building lives in the country.
items.commentary_pt: Surgiu um debate público sobre alegações que ligam a imigração a dificuldades com o idioma na Austrália, ilustrado pela história de uma imigrante que chegou sabendo pouco inglês e se tornou advogada. A discussão aborda a integração e as experiências de imigrantes construindo suas vidas no país.

items.title: Family allowed into Australia to care for slain woman’s children after commissioner’s intervention - SMH.com.au
items.commentary: A family was granted entry into Australia to care for the children of a woman who was killed, following an intervention by a commissioner. The case highlights how discretionary decisions can allow relatives to enter the country in exceptional humanitarian circumstances.
items.commentary_pt: Uma família recebeu autorização para entrar na Austrália para cuidar dos filhos de uma mulher assassinada, após a intervenção de um comissário. O caso mostra como decisões discricionárias podem permitir que parentes entrem no país em circunstâncias humanitárias excepcionais.

items.title: Court told former Wagga Wagga MP was 'kept in dark' over visa scheme - ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation
items.source: ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation
items.commentary: A court heard evidence that a former member of parliament was kept unaware of details of a visa scheme under scrutiny. The case relates to alleged irregularities in how certain visas were arranged.
items.commentary_pt: Um tribunal ouviu depoimentos de que um ex-parlamentar foi mantido sem conhecimento de detalhes de um esquema de vistos sob investigação. O caso está relacionado a supostas irregularidades na forma como certos vistos foram organizados.

items.title: Australia lifts skilled-visa income thresholds by 3.8 per cent - t.co
items.commentary: Australia has lifted the income thresholds for skilled visas by 3.8 per cent. Employers sponsoring skilled workers and applicants must now meet these updated minimum salary levels to qualify.
items.commentary_pt: A Austrália elevou em 3,8 por cento os limites de renda para vistos de qualificação profissional. Empregadores que patrocinam trabalhadores qualificados e os candidatos agora precisam atender a esses novos valores mínimos de salário para se qualificar.

items.title: Court told former MP knew lying was 'part and parcel' of visa scheme - ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation
items.source: ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation
items.commentary: A court was told that a former MP understood that dishonesty was integral to a visa scheme. The proceedings concern alleged misconduct connected to the granting of visas.
items.commentary_pt: Um tribunal foi informado de que um ex-parlamentar entendia que a desonestidade era parte fundamental de um esquema de vistos. O processo diz respeito a suposta má conduta ligada à concessão de vistos.
